label: Transparent limestone cave motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout
Primary request: Create only a sculptural limestone stalactite cave formation motif: clustered cream calcite stalactites and stalagmites forming a natural underground arch, isolated full subject, no surrounding cave room, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate limestone cave mineral forms with cream calcite, dark stone inclusions, warm gold mineral veining, wet polished highlights, porous rock texture, layered dripstone ribs, natural asymmetrical silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject. Make the silhouette useful as a design-system motif asset.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves stone detail, calcite translucency, dark recesses, and gold mineral warmth.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no full landscape, no decorative background, no extra objects, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Limestone Cave", a subterranean knowledge system derived from a stalactite limestone cave motif.
Reference use: Visually derive the entire system from cream calcite stalactites, dark underground stone, warm gold mineral seams, wet limestone texture, ribbed dripstone forms, and a quiet cave archive mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 style composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text; labels must remain legible in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: title "Limestone Cave", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose calm multilingual product UI guidance with sturdy humanist sans headings and readable Japanese UI text.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, restrained 8px card radius, subterranean knowledge-base interface, cave-map data panels, archive search, quiet analytical controls.
Color palette: cream calcite backgrounds, chalk ivory cards, dark stone ink text, limestone gray borders, muted gold primary accents, amber mineral charts, damp charcoal contrast, no unrelated bright colors.
Visual details: subtle calcite grain, dripstone vertical rhythm, gold vein dividers, dark stone hairline borders, polished but utilitarian SaaS/workspace UI.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no one-note beige-only palette.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Limestone Cave" design-system board. It must feel like the same subterranean knowledge system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the limestone cave palette roles: deepest dark stone backgrounds, cream calcite text and surfaces, warm gold mineral seams for primary actions, limestone gray borders, amber cave-map data accents, ribbed stalactite texture.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 style composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text; labels must remain legible in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: title "Limestone Cave", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; calm multilingual product UI guidance for cave archive and research interfaces.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, compact operational SaaS interface, restrained 8px cards, underground archive dashboard, cave survey data and search workflows.
Visual details: dark cave-stone shell, calcite cream readable text, muted gold focus rings and buttons, subtle wet limestone grain, fine gold vein dividers, charcoal cards, controlled contrast, no pure flat black unless used sparingly.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no one-note black-and-gold luxury styling.
